chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. S – 483 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of post-arrest bail 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of post-arrest bail 06.10.2025 Mr. Muhammad Hassan Pathan, Advocate for applicant. Mr. Aftab Ahmed Shar, Additional Prosecutor General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned Counsel for the applicant has submitted bail order of co-accused Azam Tarique as acquired by him from the learned Sessions Judge, Naushahro Feroze in B.A. No.971 of 2025, wherein the said applicant, being co-accused in the same crime, has been granted bail in the sum of Rs.50,000/-. Learned Counsel for the applicant contends that as co-accused having similar status has already been granted bail, the present applicant may also be considered in the same manner. Learned Additional PG present formally opposes the said application. However, on account of rule of consistency and the FIR specifying persons against whom the allegation is made by name, the present bail application is found required to be entertained. Accordingly, this bail application is allowed, and the applicant is admitted to post-arrest bail subject to furnishing a solvent surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/- (Rupees fifty thousand) and P.R. bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the learned trial Court. J U D G E Abdul Basit
